name: MailForge
description: Send, receive, and manage emails programmatically. Supports HTML content, attachments, and full inbox management. Ideal for agents that need to communicate with humans via email or process incoming messages.

plans.name: Pro
plans.limits: Unlimited sends, full inbox access, attachments up to 25MB

capabilities.name: send_email
capabilities.description: Send an email to one or more recipients with a subject and body. Supports plain text and HTML content, plus optional file attachments.

capabilities.name: list_inbox
capabilities.description: List recent emails in the authenticated user's inbox. Returns sender, subject, snippet, and timestamp. Supports pagination and filtering by sender or date range.

capabilities.name: search_emails
capabilities.description: Full-text search across all emails in the user's mailbox. Search by keywords, sender, date range, or attachment presence. Returns matching emails ranked by relevance.
